apod_title: Red Sprites in the Tatacoa Desert
label: namecode - SPRITES.TATACOA | 05.117
prompt: Cinematic dark monochrome generative art inspired by Red Sprites in the Tatacoa Desert. Is there an angry Sith using force lightning in the Tatacoa Desert? This is not science fiction, but a red sprite with multiple streamers! Ordinary lightning occurs when thundercloud particles Rendered as fine white particles and light filaments on a pure black background, volumetric, dramatic, monochrome white on black, lots of negative space, high detail.
